note: Piccoma EPUB 外販 (external) — Piccoma distributes EPUBs on other JP ebook stores (ブックライブ, Kindle, まんがセゾン, U-NEXT, コミックシーモア, ebookjapan, パピレス, DMM, …) on our behalf and remits a royalty share.

invoice.pattern: ^【請求書】ピッコマEPUB外販ロイヤリティー_.*\.xlsx$
invoice.note: Invoice sheet — aggregate per-title row; used as a cross-check only.

formulas.after_tax_jpy: sum(受領額) per 対象作品
formulas.after_tax_income_jpy: sum(分配金) per 対象作品
formulas.rs_rate: (分配料率 / 100)  (single rate per row, e.g. 60 → 0.60)

aggregation: One emitted record per 対象作品 (title). 店舗 (販売先) × 巻数 × 対象年月 are collapsed — GT carries a single consolidated row per title for this channel.
totals_filter: Rows where 対象年月 is empty or 分配料率 == '合計' are the totals footer → skip.

title_normalization.note: Raw 対象作品 is used verbatim as channel_title_jp and title_jp. No suffix stripping required.

sales_month_rule: Month embedded in filename prefix YYYYMM of 報告分 (〆報告分). Settlement = that same month's end.
